scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/canonical build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --import ../../scripts/install-node-sqlite-warning-filter.mjs --test dist/index.test.js
